text.edit17512000: You must have a mobile phone number on file to receive a text message.
text.RTRM_HUB_START_RECEIVING_PENSION_BENEFIT: You could start receiving your pension benefit on UNRESOLVED_TEXT, but other dates also impact your benefit.

DB_ELEC_CNCL_TITLE.assetValue: What do you want to do?

DB_ELEC_CNCL_SAVE_OPT_TXT.assetValue: Keep the choices you've made, so far. Finish making pension choices later.

DB_ELEC_CNCL_QUIT_OPT_TXT.assetValue: Cancel your pension request and lose all the pension choices you've made, so far.

DB_ELEC_CNCL_RTRN_OPT_TXT.assetValue: Go back to the current page without quitting.

DB_ELEC_CNCL_QUIT_BTN_ALT.assetValue: Choose this button to exit the flow.

DB_ELEC_CNCL_CONT_BTN_ALT.assetValue: Choose this button to continue on to the next step in the process.

DB_ELEC_CNCL_LATER_BTN_ALT.assetValue: Choose this button to save all the changes and choices you have made so far, but exit the flow at this time.

DB_ELEC_CONTINUE_BTN_ACCESSIBILITY_TXT.assetValue: Choose this button to continue on to the next step in the process.

DB_ELEC_COMEBACKLATER_BTN_ACCESSIBILITY_.assetValue: Choose this button to save all the changes and choices you have made so far, but exit the flow at this time.

DB_ELEC_QUIT_BTN_ACCESSIBILITY_TXT.assetValue: Choose this button to exit the flow and save none of the choices you made up to this point.

DB_ELEC_BACK_BTN_ACCESSIBILITY_TXT.assetValue: Choose this button to return to the prior page without saving any changes or choices you made on this page.

RTRM_HUB_GET_STARTED_DO_TODAY_RETIREE_HE.assetValue: Review and acknowledge your Notice of Rights.
Defer choosing your pension form of payment.

RTRM_HUB_GET_STARTED_DO_TODAY_HEADER.assetValue: What Do You Want to Do Today?

RTRM_HUB_GET_STARTED_DO_TODAY_PARA.assetValue: You can make pension and/or retiree health benefits choices now.

RTRM_HUB_GET_STARTED_DO_TODAY_PENSION_ON.assetValue: To make your pension choices, complete each step in the pension process.

RTRM_HUB_GET_STARTED_DO_TODAY_RETIREE_HE.assetValue: To make only your retiree health choices now, you'll need to complete just some steps in the pension process. Print this page for reference.
• Review and acknowledge your Notice of Rights.
• Defer choosing your pension form of payment.

RTRM_HUB_GET_STARTED_DO_TODAY_PENSION_AN.assetValue: To make both pension and retiree health choices, you must complete all steps in the pension process, then make your health choices.

RTRM_CHOICES_EMAIL_CNFM_NOTIFY_INTRO.assetValue: If you have a preferred email address, you'll receive:

DB_RTRM_CHOICES_PRFD_EMAIL.assetValue: preferred email address

RTRM_CHOICES_EMAIL_CNFM_NOTIFY_ITEM_ONE.assetValue: • Confirmations of your benefit choices or decisions

RTRM_CHOICES_EMAIL_CNFM_NOTIFY_ITEM_TWO.assetValue: • Notifications of information that you need to provide or complete

DB_RETIREMENT_SPECIALISTS_QUESTIONS_BOX_.assetValue: If or when you have questions, specialists are ready to help at 1-888-123-4567 (8 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday).

RTRM_CHOICES_VERIFY_YOUR_INFO_INTRO_TXT.assetValue: Some of your benefits are calculated based on the information below. If any of this information is not correct, use the links below to update it. The information must be correct before you can continue the retirement process.

RTRM_CHOICES_VERIFY_YOUR_INFO_ABOUT_YOU_.assetValue: If your information is not correct, contact Human Resources at 1-800-.
After we receive the updated information, you can start the retirement process again. Allow up to 7 days for your new information to appear on this site.
Your benefits will be calculated based on the information you provide.
If your information is not correct, contact a The Syndicate Emporium of Benefits representative at 1-800-4-SYNDCT.
After you contact the The Syndicate Emporium of Benefits, you can start the retirement process again.
This table shows basic information about you.
You'll be 100% vested in the plan after 5 years of service.
You're scheduled to become 100% vested in the plan on ${token:VEST_DATE}.

RTRM_CHOICES_VERIFY_YOUR_INFO_MARITAL_ST.assetValue: Our records show that you're not married. If you're married, add your spouse's information.
This table shows basic information about your spouse.

RTRM_CHOICES_VERIFY_YOUR_INFO_CONTACT_IN.assetValue: 30% will be withheld because you have a permanent address outside the U.S. ...

Any payments you request today will have 30% withheld from taxable income. You may be eligible to withhold at a lower rate if your country of residence qualifies for a reduced treaty rate or you are a U.S. citizen. If you are interested in a reduced rate or are a U.S. citizen, refer to Residency Certification (PDF, ${token:pdfFileSize} MB) for further instruction. Residency Certification may take several weeks, and must be submitted and approved before requesting a payment with the reduced rate.

DB_RESIDENCY_CERT_PDF.assetValue: Residency Certification

RTRM_CHOICES_VERIFY_YOUR_INFO_CONTACT_IN.assetValue: This table shows basic contact information.
After you retire, information can only be sent to a personal email address. You can change your preferred email now or later.
You can receive prerecorded messages about your benefits. Choose Change to review or update your preference.

RTRM_CHOICES_VERIFY_YOUR_INFO_CHOOSE_RTR.assetValue: Choose How to Receive Your Retirement Kit
This table identifies how you'll receive your retirement kit.

The retirement kit includes paper copies of the same information about the retirement process that you can print from this site. For example, one of the enclosures has details about your pension payment choices, which you can also print from this site.
I'll review the information on this site and reduce paper usage.
Note: All of the information in the retirement kit is available on this site.

You can receive personal information about your benefits through the Secure Mailbox on this site. The mailbox is more secure than Internet email because all messages sent to it are encrypted, which means unauthorized persons can't read them.
Email me a retirement kit to my Secure Mailbox on this site, which I can then print myself for my records. (Allow 30 minutes for delivery.)
To receive the kit by postal mail, change your delivery preference.

DB_RTRM_CHOICES_DELIVERY_PREFERNCE.assetValue: delivery preference

RTRM_CHOICES_VERIFY_YOUR_INFO_CHOOSE_RTR.assetValue: Send a retirement kit to me by postal mail. (Allow 3 to 5 business days for delivery.)
For faster delivery, change your delivery preference and have the kit sent to the Secure Mailbox on this site.

RTRM_CHOICES_VERIFY_YOUR_INFO_DLVR_RTRM_.assetValue: You'll receive a retirement kit by postal mail. (Allow 3 to 5 business days for delivery.)
For faster delivery, change your delivery preference and have the kit sent electronically to the Secure Mailbox on this site.
Note: All of the information in the retirement kit is available on this site.
You'll receive a retirement kit via your Secure Mailbox on this site, which you can then print yourself for your records. (Allow 30 minutes for delivery.)
To receive the kit by postal mail instead of via your Secure Mailbox, change your delivery preference.
